name: IdsEdwRunCycUpdt

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, EDW_LOAD_IN, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.TargetSys}' AND SUBJ_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsProdRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, EDW_LOAD_IN) UPDATE T SET T.EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte C ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD = C.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD = C.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD = C.SUBJ_CD AND T.EDW_LOAD_IN = C.EDW_LOAD_IN AND T.RUN_CYC_NO >= C.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE T.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

Annotations:
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
Job Name:
IdsEdwLoadProdRunCycUpdExtr
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Load file created in the previous job will be loaded into the target DB2 table here. 

Update logic; "Update then Insert" Or "Insert then Update" will be chosen depending on the nature of data going into the table. If there are more updates than Inserts, then Update then Insert should be selected.
When the Inserts are more than Updates, then Insert then Update should be selected
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file

This file is an append
